mapper.select: /* 토론 현황 조회 ForumJoinUserDAO.selectForumScoreStatus */ SELECT NVL(SUM(IF(T.atclCnt = 0 AND T.cmntCnt = 0, 1, 0)), 0) AS noStareCnt , NVL(SUM(IF(T.atclCnt > 0 OR T.cmntCnt > 0, 1, 0)), 0) AS completeCnt , NVL(ROUND(AVG(T.SCR)), 0) AS avgScore , NVL(MAX(T.SCR), 0) AS maxScore , NVL(MIN(T.SCR), 0) AS minScore FROM ( SELECT A.USER_ID AS stdNo , NVL(C.SCR, 0) AS SCR , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL AS B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND B.USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' ) AS atclCnt , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT AS B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND B.USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' ) AS cmntCnt FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC AS A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP AS C ON A.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND C.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'ATNDLC' )T

/* 토론 참여 목록 조회2 ForumJoinUserDAO.listPaging */ SELECT
ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY userNm) AS LINE_NO
ROW_NUMBER() OVER(ORDER BY LENGTH(teamNm), teamNm, userNm) AS LINE_NO
, forumCd , deptNm , stdntNo , userId , userRprsId , userNm , score , evalYn /* 추가된 평가여부 */ , scoreNull , ( CASE WHEN actlCnt > 0 THEN '참여' ELSE '미참여' END ) AS joinStatus , actlCnt , cmntCnt , userId , teamCd , COUNT(1) OVER() AS totalCnt , forumFdbkCd , fdbkCts , profMemo , teamNm , CASE WHEN memberRole = 'Y' THEN '팀장' ELSE '팀원' END AS memberRole , mutCnt , mutAvg , mutSn , mobileNo , email , forumMyAtclCnt , forumAtclCnt , forumMyCmntCnt , forumCmntCnt , evalRsltOpenYn , evalStartDttm , evalEndDttm , SCYR , ENTR_YY , ENTR_HY , ENTR_GBN , ENTR_GBN_NM , DGRS_CRS_GBNCD , GRSC_DEGR_CORS_GBN_NM FROM ( SELECT CASE WHEN C.BYTEAM_DSCS_USEYN = 'Y' AND CD.DSCS_ID IS NOT NULL THEN CD.DSCS_ID ELSE C.DSCS_ID END AS forumCd , NVL((SELECT D.DEPTNM FROM TB_LMS_DEPT D WHERE D.DEPT_ID = U.DEPT_ID), '-') AS DEPTNM , U.STDNT_NO AS stdntNo , U.USERNM AS userNm , U.USER_RPRS_ID AS userRprsId /* 조인된 PTCP 테이블에서 직접 조회 */ , NVL(P.SCR, 0) AS score , NVL(P.EVLYN, 'N') AS evalYn , NVL(TO_CHAR(P.SCR), '-') AS scoreNull
, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND B.RGTR_ID = A.USER_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' ) AS actlCnt , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT B JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL AA ON B.DSCS_ATCL_ID = AA.DSCS_ATCL_ID WHERE AA.DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND B.RGTR_ID = A.USER_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N') AS cmntCnt , U.USER_ID as userId , TM.TEAM_ID AS teamCd
, (SELECT MIN(DSCS_FDBK_ID) KEEP (DENSE_RANK FIRST ORDER BY MOD_DTTM) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_FDBK B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND B.USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.UP_DSCS_FDBK_ID IS NULL) AS forumFdbkCd , (SELECT B.FDBK_CTS FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_FDBK B WHERE B.DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND B.USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND B.UP_DSCS_FDBK_ID IS NULL AND B.MOD_DTTM = (SELECT MAX(MOD_DTTM) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_FDBK WHERE DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND UP_DSCS_FDBK_ID IS NULL) AND ROWNUM = 1) AS fdbkCts , P.PROF_MEMO AS profMemo , (SELECT BB.TEAMNM FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR B JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM BB ON B.TEAM_ID = BB.TEAM_ID WHERE B.USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND BB.TEAM_ID = TM.TEAM_ID AND ROWNUM = 1) AS teamNm , (SELECT B.LDRYN FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR B JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM BB ON B.TEAM_ID = BB.TEAM_ID WHERE B.USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND BB.TEAM_ID = TM.TEAM_ID AND ROWNUM = 1) AS memberRole , 0 AS mutCnt , 0 AS mutAvg , '' AS mutSn , (SELECT MAX(CNTCT) FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT T1 WHERE T1.USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND T1.CNTCT_TYCD = 'MBL_PHN') AS mobileNo , (SELECT MAX(CNTCT) FROM TB_LMS_USER_CNTCT T1 WHERE T1.USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND T1.CNTCT_TYCD = 'INDV_EML') AS email , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL WHERE DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N' AND RGTR_ID = A.USER_ID) AS forumMyAtclCnt , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL B WHERE DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND DELYN = 'N') AS forumAtclCnt , 0 AS afterAtclCnt , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND RGTR_ID = A.USER_ID AND DSCS_ATCL_ID IN ( SELECT CX.DSCS_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL CX WHERE CX.DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND CX.DELYN = 'N' )) AS forumMyCmntCnt , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_CMNT WHERE DELYN = 'N' AND DSCS_ATCL_ID IN ( SELECT CX.DSCS_ATCL_ID FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_ATCL CX WHERE CX.DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND CX.DELYN = 'N' )) AS forumCmntCnt , 0 AS afterCmntCnt , 'N' AS evalRsltOpenYn , '' AS evalStartDttm , '' AS evalEndDttm , NVL(TO_CHAR(A.SCYR), '-') AS SCYR , NVL('-','-') ENTR_YY , NVL('-','-') ENTR_HY , NVL('-','-') ENTR_GBN , NVL('-','-') ENTR_GBN_NM , A.DGRS_CRS_GBNCD , (SELECT MAX(CDNM) FROM TB_LMS_CMMN_CD WHERE CD = A.DGRS_CRS_GBNCD AND UP_CD = 'GDSC_DGRS_CRS_GBNCD') AS GRSC_DEGR_CORS_GBN_NM FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC A JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS C ON C.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND C.DELYN = 'N' JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON A.USER_ID = U.USER_ID /* 참여자 테이블 조인 추가: DSCS_ID와 USER_ID 조건 */ LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP P ON P.DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND P.USER_ID = A.USER_ID /* 수강생 팀 매핑: C.LRN_GRP_ID 범위 내 수강생 팀 (IN 서브쿼리로 중복 행 방지) */ LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR TM ON TM.USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND TM.TEAM_ID IN (SELECT T.TEAM_ID FROM TB_LMS_TEAM T WHERE T.LRN_GRP_ID = C.LRN_GRP_ID) /* byteamDscsUseyn='Y' 일 때 팀별 자식 DSCS 조인 */ LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS CD ON CD.UP_DSCS_ID = C.DSCS_ID AND CD.TEAM_ID = TM.TEAM_ID AND CD.DELYN = 'N' WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'ATNDLC' AND A.AUDITYN = 'N' ) T WHERE 1 = 1
AND actlCnt > 0
AND actlCnt = 0
AND T.memberRole = 'Y'
AND T.memberRole != 'Y'
AND T.scoreNull != '-'
AND T.scoreNull = '-'
AND ( LOWER(deptNm) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(userId) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) OR LOWER(userNm) LIKE FN_LIKE_VAL(LOWER(#{searchValue})) )
ORDER BY LINE_NO ASC

/* 수강생 토론 성적 조회2 ForumJoinUserDAO.forumJoinUserList */ SELECT U.USER_ID AS stdId , U.DSCS_ID AS forumCd , NVL(SCR, 0) AS score , EVLYN AS evalYn , U.RGTR_ID AS rgtrId , U.REG_DTTM AS regDttm , U.MDFR_ID AS mdfrId , U.MOD_DTTM AS modDttm , U.DELYN AS delYn , (SELECT NVL(USER_ID, S.USER_ID) FROM TB_LMS_USER WHERE USER_ID = S.USER_ID) AS userId FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP U JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS D ON U.DSCS_ID = D.DSCS_ID -- 토론 마스터 조인 JOIN TB_LMS_ATNDLC S ON U.USER_ID = S.USER_ID AND D.SBJCT_ID = S.SBJCT_ID -- 사용자 및 과목코드 일치 WHERE U.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND S.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'ATNDLC'

/* 교수 메모 팝업창 정보 ForumJoinUserDAO.selectProfMemo */ SELECT D.DEPTNM AS deptNm , U.USER_ID AS userId , U.USERNM AS userNm , NVL(A.SCR, 0) AS SCR , B.SBJCT_ID AS crsCreCd , B.DSCS_TTL AS forumTitle , B.DSCS_SDTTM AS forumStartDttm , B.DSCS_EDTTM AS forumEndDttm , A.PROF_MEMO AS profMemo FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP A /* 토론 정보 조인 */ LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS B ON A.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID /* 2. 사용자 정보 조인 */ LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_USER U ON A.USER_ID = U.USER_ID /* 3. 학과 부서 정보 조인 (DEPT_ID 기준) */ LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_DEPT D ON U.DEPT_ID = D.DEPT_ID WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND A.USER_ID = #{stdId}

/* SQL ID : ForumJoinUserDAO.selectStudentsNotInPtcp 설명 : DSCS_PTCP 미등록 학생 목록 조회 (insertJoinUser loop용) */ SELECT A.USER_ID AS stdId , B.DSCS_ID AS forumCd , (SELECT MAX(E.TEAM_ID) FROM TB_LMS_TEAM_MBR E WHERE E.TEAM_ID = B.TEAM_ID AND E.USER_ID = A.USER_ID) AS teamCd FROM TB_LMS_ATNDLC A JOIN TB_LMS_DSCS B ON A.SBJCT_ID = B.SBJCT_ID WHERE A.SBJCT_ID = #{crsCreCd} AND B.DSCS_ID = #{forumCd} AND A.ATNDLC_STSCD = 'ATNDLC' AND B.DELYN = 'N' AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP P WHERE P.USER_ID = A.USER_ID AND P.DSCS_ID = B.DSCS_ID )
mapper.insert: /* SQL ID : ForumJoinUserDAO.insertForumJoinUser 설명 : 토론참여자 단건 INSERT (PK: DSCS_PTCP_ID IdGenerator 사용) */ INSERT INTO TB_LMS_DSCS_PTCP ( DSCS_PTCP_ID, USER_ID, DSCS_ID, TEAM_ID, RGTR_ID, REG_DTTM, MDFR_ID, MOD_DTTM, DELYN ) VALUES ( #{dscsPtcpId}, #{stdId}, #{forumCd}, #{teamCd}, #{rgtrId}, FN_DTTM(), #{mdfrId}, FN_DTTM(), 'N' )
